# RK E&C Pte Ltd

> Singapore renovation and handyman contractor specialising in HDB flats and condos. One in-house crew for the whole job — renovation, handyman repairs, move-in / move-out cleaning, fixture fixing and Taobao furniture assembly. Singapore-registered (UEN 202442767D). Free site visit, fixed-price quotes, island-wide.

## About
- Company: RK E&C Pte Ltd (UEN 202442767D), Singapore
- Phone / WhatsApp: +65 8650 0941
- Email: hello@rkec.sg
- Service area: All of Singapore (HDB, condo, landed)
- Promise: free site visit, itemised fixed-price quote, in-house crew (not sub-contracted), clean handover

## Services
- [HDB Renovation](https://rkec.sg/#services): flooring, walls & ceilings, waterproofing, tiling and paint — full or partial renovation
- [Handyman](https://rkec.sg/#services): patching, drilling, mounting, silicone, door and hinge fixes, leaks and odd repairs
- [Move-In / Move-Out Cleaning](https://rkec.sg/#services): deep clean of floors, toilets, kitchen, windows and grilles for handover or inspection
- [Fixture Fixing](https://rkec.sg/#services): lights, fans, taps, sinks, toilet bowls, curtain rails and TV brackets — supplied or yours, mounted and tested
- [Taobao Goods Assembly](https://rkec.sg/#services): flat-pack and imported furniture unpacked, assembled, levelled and wall-anchored
- [Painting & Tiling](https://rkec.sg/#services): full repaint, feature walls, floor and wall tiling, marble
- [Ceiling & Drywall](https://rkec.sg/#services): false ceilings, cove and L-box lighting, partition walls
- [Plumbing](https://rkec.sg/#services): taps, sinks, basins, toilet bowls, water heaters, concealed pipework, leak repair
- [Demolition & Hacking](https://rkec.sg/#services): hacking of walls, floors and fittings, full strip-out with debris cleared

## Guides
- [Taobao furniture assembly in Singapore: cost, safety & what to expect](https://rkec.sg/guides/taobao-furniture-assembly-singapore/): typical assembly costs, DIY vs hiring a handyman, wall-anchoring and tip-over safety, common flat-pack problems, and how to prep your HDB for the appointment.
